description: Style NoteComfy enough for everyday play but cute enough to wear to her best friend's birthday party, choose this frock from doodle if you're looking for a versatile dress which girls will love.Product DetailsOrange dress, has a round neckline, short fold over sleeves, graphic print with bow and sequin detail in front and frills at the hemlineMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash coldTumble dry lowUse cool iron
